info.name: Libero Store API V1
info.description:
Multi-tenant REST API for Libero Ecommerce platform.

## Applications
- **Store App**: Customer-facing endpoints
- **Cashier App**: Merchant & Staff management
- **Captain App**: Captain agent operations

## Authentication
All apps use OTP-based authentication.

## Required Headers
- `X-Store-Key`: Tenant identifier
- `Authorization`: Bearer {token}
- `Accept-Language`: ar or en

## Rate Limiting
- OTP: 5 requests/minute
- Auth: 10 requests/minute
- API: 60 requests/minute

request.description:
Request OTP for customer authentication.

**Rate Limit:** 5 requests/minute

**Required Fields:**

- `phone`: Customer phone number
    

if you get

```
 "is_new_user": false

 ```

use update profile request to complete user data

Verify OTP and get access token.

**Rate Limit:** 10 requests/minute

**Required Fields:**

- `phone`: Customer phone number
    
- `otp`: One-time password received via SMS (for test :0000)
    

**Response:** Token is automatically saved to `customer_token` variable
Get current authenticated customer information.
Invalidate current customer token.

Request OTP for cashier authentication.

**Required Fields:**
- `phone`: Cashier phone number

Verify OTP and get access token.

**Note:** Validates that user has cashier role (owner, admin, staff)

**Required Fields:**

- `phone`: Cashier phone number
    
- `otp`: One-time password (for test :0000)
Get current authenticated cashier information.
Invalidate current cashier token.

Request OTP for captain agent authentication.

**Required Fields:**
- `phone`: Captain agent phone number

Verify OTP and get access token.

**Note:** Validates that user has captain role

**Required Fields:**
- `phone`: Captain agent phone number
- `otp`: One-time password
Get current authenticated captain agent information.
Invalidate current captain agent token.
Get customer profile information.

# Update Customer Profile

## Update Profile

Updates the authenticated customer's profile information.

**Note:** This endpoint also serves as "Complete Registration" for new customers. If the customer's name is empty or "Guest", `first_name` becomes required.

### Request

```
PUT /api/v1/store/profile

 ```

### Body Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required |
| --- | --- | --- |
| first_name | string | Conditional\* |
| middle_name | string | No |
| last_name | string | No |
| email | string | No |

`_first_name_` _is \*_required** if customer has no name or name is "Guest" (new registration flow)

### Example Request

``` json
{
    "first_name": "Ahmed",
    "last_name": "Mohammed",
    "email": "ahmed@example.com"
}

 ```

# Get Products

## 🔗 Endpoint

```
GET /api/v1/store/products

 ```

---

## 🎛️ Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `search` | string | \- | 🔍 Search in product title and description |
| `category_id` | integer | \- | Filter by category ID |
| `brand_id` | integer | \- | Filter by brand ID |
| `collection_id` | integer | \- | Filter by collection ID |
| `is_featured` | boolean | \- | ⭐ Filter featured products only |
| `is_latest` | boolean | \- | 🆕 Filter latest products only |
| `min_price` | numeric | \- | 💰 Minimum price filter |
| `max_price` | numeric | \- | 💰 Maximum price filter |
| `sort` | string | `created_at` | Sort field: `price`, `title`, `created_at` |
| `order` | string | `asc` | Sort direction: `asc`, `desc` |
| `per_page` | integer | `15` | Items per page |
| `page` | integer | `1` | Page number |

---

## 📝 Usage Examples

### Basic Requests

``` http
# Get all products (paginated)
GET /products
# Search products
GET /products?search=برجر
# Get products by category
GET /products?category_id=1
# Get products by brand
GET /products?brand_id=2

 ```

### Featured & Latest

``` http
# Get featured products
GET /products?is_featured=true
# Get latest products
GET /products?is_latest=true
# Get featured products from specific category
GET /products?is_featured=true&category_id=1

 ```

### Price Filtering

``` http
# Products under 100 SAR
GET /products?max_price=100
# Products between 50-200 SAR
GET /products?min_price=50&max_price=200

 ```

### Sorting

``` http
# Sort by price (low to high)
GET /products?sort=price&order=asc
# Sort by price (high to low)
GET /products?sort=price&order=desc
# Sort by newest
GET /products?sort=created_at&order=desc

 ```

### Combined Filters

``` http
# Featured products in category, sorted by price
GET /products?category_id=1&is_featured=true&sort=price&order=asc
# Search with price range
GET /products?search=قهوة&min_price=10&max_price=50
# Full filter example
GET /products?category_id=1&brand_id=2&min_price=50&max_price=500&sort=price&order=asc&per_page=20

 ```

---

## ✅ Response Format

``` json
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Products retrieved successfully",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 1,
            "title": "برجر كلاسيكي",
            "price": 25.00,
            "sale_price": null,
            "cover_image_url": "https://...",
            "is_available": true,
            "type": "FOOD"
        }
    ],
    "meta": {
        "current_page": 1,
        "last_page": 5,
        "per_page": 15,
        "total": 72
    }
}

 ```

---

## 💡 Best Practices

1. **Use** **`is_featured=true`** for homepage featured section
    
2. **Use** **`is_latest=true`** for "New Arrivals" section
    
3. **Combine filters** for advanced search pages
    
4. **Use pagination** (`per_page`, `page`) for large result sets
    
5. **Cache responses** on client side when possible
    

---

**URL Parameters:**
- `id`: Product ID

Get order details.

**URL Parameters:**
- `id`: Order ID

Create new order.

**Required Fields:**
- `items`: Array of order items
  - `product_id`: Product ID (required)
  - `quantity`: Quantity (required)
  - `variant_id`: Variant ID (optional)
  - `addons`: Array of addon items (optional)
  - `custom_fields`: Custom field values (optional)
  - `notes`: Item notes (optional)
- `address_id`: Captain address ID
- `payment_method`: cash, card, wallet

**Optional Fields:**
- `coupon_code`: Discount coupon
- `notes`: Order notes

item.name: Branches

request.description:
Get all active branches with optional filtering.

**Examples:**
```
GET /branches              # All branches
GET /branches?type=1       # Branches only (no warehouses/kitchens)
GET /branches?search=الرياض # Search by name
```
Get full details of a specific branch including address and working hours.

item.description:
# 🏢 Branches API

API endpoints for retrieving store branches.

## Endpoint

```
GET /api/v1/{app}/branches

 ```

Where `{app}` is: `store`, `cashier`, or `captain`

## Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `type` | int | Filter by type: 1=Branch, 2=Warehouse, 3=Kitchen |
| `search` | string | Search by branch name |

## Response (List)

``` json
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Branches retrieved successfully",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 1,
            "name": "فرع الرياض",
            "type": 1,
            "type_label": "فرع",
            "image_url": "https://...",
            "status": 1
        }
    ]
}

 ```

## Response (Details)

``` json
{
    "success": true,
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "فرع الرياض",
        "type": 1,
        "type_label": "فرع",
        "description": "الفرع الرئيسي",
        "image_url": "https://...",
        "status": 1,
        "support_channels": [...],
        "address": {...},
        "working_hours": {...}
    }
}

 ```

request.description: Get store configuration including theme, app version, and home sections.

Get static params (enums).

**Returns:**
- `user_roles`: Available user roles
- `pid_types`: ID types
- `nationalities`: Available nationalities
- `product_types`: Product types with shipping/digital flags

# Get all categories.

## Parameters

```
# Flat list (للـ dropdowns, filters)
GET /categories
# Tree structure (للـ navigation menu)
GET /categories?tree=true

 ```

```
# Get root categories only
GET /categories?parent_id=null
# Get children of category 5
GET /categories?parent_id=5

 ```
